title: lathyrus lanszwertii var. tracyi
intro: Lathyrus lanszwertii var. tracyi, also known as Tracy's lathyrus, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States, specifically in California and Oregon. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of arthritis and improving cardiovascular health. Lathyrus lanszwertii var. tracyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
